sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108900" key="u(poparalhre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποπαρα-ληρέω</orth>, <sense id="n108900.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wander, be slightly delirious,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg006.perseus-grc1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
